ddls:
CREATE TABLE "squirrel_sightings" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sighting */,
  "unique_squirrel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each squirrel */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sighting location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sighting location */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sighting */,
  "hectare" TEXT /* Hectare where the sighting occurred */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift during which the sighting occurred (AM/PM) */,
  "age_class" TEXT /* Age class of the squirrel (e.g., Infant, Juvenile, Sub-adult, Adult) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the squirrel (Male, Female, Unknown) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the squirrel (in grams) */,
  "primary_fur_color" TEXT /* Primary fur color of the squirrel */,
  "highlight_fur_color" TEXT /* Highlight fur color of the squirrel */,
  "combination_of_primary_and_highlight_color" TEXT /* Combination of primary and highlight fur colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squirrel_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior record */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting associated with the behavior */,
  "running" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was running (0/1) */,
  "chasing" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was chasing (0/1) */,
  "climbing" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was climbing (0/1) */,
  "eating" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was eating (0/1) */,
  "foraging" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was foraging (0/1) */,
  "jumping" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was jumping (0/1) */,
  "vocalizing" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was vocalizing (0/1) */,
  "agonistic_interactions" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was involved in agonistic interactions (0/1) */,
  "behavior_duration" REAL /* Duration of the behavior (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_behavior_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latlong" TEXT /* Geospatial coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "community_district" TEXT /* Community district of the location */,
  "borough_boundary" TEXT /* Borough boundary of the location */,
  "city_council_district" TEXT /* City council district of the location */,
  "police_precinct" TEXT /* Police precinct of the location */,
  "spatial_reference_system" TEXT /* Spatial reference system used for geospatial coordinates (e.g., WGS84, NAD83) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location (in meters) */,
  "land_cover_type" TEXT /* Land cover type of the location (e.g., forest, grassland, urban) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_traps" (
  "camera_trap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera trap */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the camera trap is deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the camera trap was deployed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for maintaining the camera trap (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_trap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting associated with the observation */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date the observation was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_observations_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citizen_science_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "coordinator" TEXT /* Name of the project coordinator */,
  "participant_info" TEXT /* Information about project participants (e.g., number, demographics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citizen_contributed_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data contribution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the data contribution */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data contributed (e.g., photo, video, note) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data contributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizen_contributed_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES citizen_science_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, park ranger) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization, government agency) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squirrel_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting associated with the demographic record */,
  "age_class" TEXT /* Age class of the squirrel (e.g., Infant, Juvenile, Sub-adult, Adult) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the squirrel (Male, Female, Unknown) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the squirrel (in grams) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_demographics_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)
